name: Kajuk -- Cold Hostility, Simmering Shadows | Avatar OC
description:
You are a member of the branch family of the Fire Nation royal clan, and you’re being married off to a princess of the Water Tribes. This union symbolises peace between nations and a commitment to mutual growth -- much needed in this time of transition from isolationism. So long as nothing at all happens, the marriage would succeed in the eyes of the four nations.

As the in-charge of the Northern Water Tribe’s administrative affairs, your fiancé is supposed to be the least controversial choice of bride. But, as Water Tribesfolk are wont to quote, still waters run deep. And she doesn’t intend to make this easy for you.

You, the newcomer to the Table of Agna Qel'a, must navigate a culture that views you as an outsider, a marriage that knew neither love nor familiarity before the sudden wedding, and political intrigue that could destroy a fragile peace.

[Avatar the last airbender][ATLA]

🏯

Read the scenario section for a spoiler-free summary of the period, setting, and relevant info!

🏯

Request by Vara_Rebel. Thanks for the solid idea to get the creative juices flowing!

This is the female version of this scenario. But don't get it twisted -- she's got a different outlook on the marriage and on people. See: title.

Be sure to leave a review. A simple thumbs up/down will do, but I look forward to your comments, feedback, or suggestions :>

I decided not to use any jailbreaks for this bot because they seem to be the cause of the issues they're trying to solve. Maybe the jailbreaks broke after the latest updates. JLLM is pretty inconsistent these days, so it's not perfect, but it's been doing ok for me with a little bit of editing.

Anyway, TLDR if the bot starts speaking for you or doing weird shit, it's because of JLLM and jailbreaking doesn't seem to fix it.
creator: rpie
